allow: Bash(node -e "try { require\(''mammoth''\); console.log\(''mammoth available''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''mammoth not available''\); }")
Bash(cmd //c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr :4200 ^| findstr LISTENING''\) do taskkill /PID %a /F")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d.get\(''exports'',{}\) if ''chip'' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(timeout 15 bash -c 'while ! curl -s http://localhost:4200 > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done; echo ""Server ready""')

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding\(''utf8''\); let d=''''; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const src = j.sourcesContent[0]; const idx = src.indexOf\(''form''\); if\(idx>-1\) console.log\(src.substring\(idx, idx+2000\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding\(''utf8''\); let d=''''; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const src = j.sourcesContent[0]; const idx = src.indexOf\(''formField''\); if\(idx>-1\) console.log\(src.substring\(idx, idx+1500\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding\(''utf8''\); let d=''''; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const src = j.sourcesContent[0]; const shadowIdx = src.indexOf\(''shadow''\); let fieldIdx = src.lastIndexOf\(''formField'', shadowIdx\); if\(fieldIdx === -1\) fieldIdx = 0; console.log\(''--- Looking for shadow in light/dark color schemes ---''\); const lightIdx = src.indexOf\(''light''\); if\(lightIdx>-1\) { const chunk = src.substring\(lightIdx, lightIdx+3000\); const fIdx = chunk.indexOf\(''formField''\); if\(fIdx>-1\) console.log\(''LIGHT formField:'', chunk.substring\(fIdx, fIdx+600\)\); }}\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding\(''utf8''\); let d=''''; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const src = j.sourcesContent[0]; const lightIdx = src.indexOf\(''light''\); if\(lightIdx>-1\) { const chunk = src.substring\(lightIdx, lightIdx+3000\); const fIdx = chunk.indexOf\(''formField''\); if\(fIdx>-1\) console.log\(chunk.substring\(fIdx, fIdx+1000\)\); }}\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding\(''utf8''\); let d=''''; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const src = j.sourcesContent[0]; const idx = src.indexOf\(""shadow: ''0 0 #0000""\); if\(idx>-1\) { const end = src.indexOf\(""''"", idx+9\); console.log\(''SHADOW:'', src.substring\(idx, end+1\)\); }}\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding\(''utf8''\); let d=''''; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const src = j.sourcesContent[0]; const darkIdx = src.indexOf\(''dark''\); if\(darkIdx>-1\) { const chunk = src.substring\(darkIdx, darkIdx+3000\); const fIdx = chunk.indexOf\(''formField''\); if\(fIdx>-1\) { const shadowIdx = chunk.indexOf\(''shadow'', fIdx\); if\(shadowIdx>-1\) { const end = chunk.indexOf\(""''"", shadowIdx+10\); console.log\(''DARK:'', chunk.substring\(shadowIdx, end+1\)\); }}}}\)")
